hero.title: Daycare, grooming, spa, and hydrotherapy
hero.intro: A consolidated service page combining the original source content into one clear structure.

sections.title: Doggy daycare for social dogs
paragraphs: Structured groups, active play, and monitored rest blocks help dogs stay engaged without becoming overstimulated.
Choose full-day or half-day attendance and build a weekly rhythm that fits your routine.

sections.title: Grooming and coat-care essentials
paragraphs: From practical maintenance to style-led sessions, grooming is tailored to coat type, lifestyle, and comfort.
Add-on hygiene care can be included to keep regular visits efficient and stress-free.
bullets: De-shed, bath and dry, and styling paths
Add-ons for nails, ears, and hygiene

sections.title: Spa and hydrotherapy pathways
paragraphs: Spa treatments support skin and coat comfort, while hydrotherapy pathways cover recovery, mobility, and low-impact conditioning.
You can choose a clinical route, a fitness route, or combine both with grooming and daycare support.
bullets: Dog spa packages for coat and skin wellbeing
Fun and fitness swims for active dogs

accordion.title: Doggy Daycare
paragraphs: K9 Leisure Club positions daycare as a supervised, social, and active environment with indoor and outdoor play options.
The source content emphasizes safe socialisation, playgroup oversight, and balanced rest and play throughout the day.

accordion.title: Dog Grooming
paragraphs: The grooming content describes options from quick tidy-ups to full styling and maintenance care.
Services include de-shedding, bathing and drying, styling, and practical hygiene add-ons.
bullets: De-shedding, bath and dry, and styling routes
Size-based options for different coat needs

accordion.title: Dog Spa
paragraphs: The spa section focuses on comfort-oriented treatments and coat and skin support.
Packages are framed as pampering sessions with practical coat-care benefits.
bullets: Mud bath and milk bath options
Paw care add-ons for finishing touches

accordion.title: Hydrotherapy
paragraphs: Hydrotherapy is presented as supportive for mobility, recovery, and fitness, including both therapy-focused and fun swim pathways.
The source notes owner presence is required for sessions and highlights benefits for dogs with reduced mobility or rehabilitation goals.

faq.q: How often should dogs attend daycare?
faq.a: Attendance depends on routine, age, and energy levels. The source content offers both full-day and half-day routes so owners can build a suitable schedule.

faq.q: Do dogs need grooming on a fixed schedule?
faq.a: The source service copy indicates frequency varies by coat type, breed, and lifestyle. Grooming options are offered from maintenance to full styling.
Hydrotherapy is described as useful for mobility support, post-operative recovery, fitness, and low-impact conditioning depending on a dog's needs.
